supply_chain.dependencies: Single or sole source suppliers for specialized scanning equipment, rapid prototyping machines, resin and other advanced materials, optics, electronic and mechanical components of iTero scanners. CT scanning and stereolithography equipment and critical scanner optics components provided by single or sole source suppliers. Resin and polymer raw materials purchased from a single source.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain vulnerabilities from single and sole suppliers in limited locations. Dependency on contract manufacturers for quality and stability. Risk of production interruptions, delays, and inefficiencies. Technology changes by service providers and vendors could disrupt manufacturing capacity. Delivery delays, labor stoppages or shortages, price increases. Inability to quickly establish or qualify replacement suppliers. Potential for significant interruptions in supply of products.

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations and 510(k) clearance requirements for medical devices
Medical Device Regulation EU 2017/745 compliance
Quality System regulations and ISO 13485:2016 certification requirements
Healthcare provider reimbursement regulations (Medicaid, national healthcare programs)
Transparency reporting laws (sunshine laws) for transfers of value to healthcare professionals
HIPAA Privacy Standards and Security Standards compliance
HITECH Act requirements
State privacy laws including California Consumer Protection Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act
GDPR compliance in European Union
Data export restrictions and international transfer laws
Cross-border data transfer requirements in China, Australia, Japan, and other countries
Data localization requirements in various countries
Anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws (FCPA, UK Bribery Act of 2010)
Marketing and advertising restrictions for medical devices in various countries
Environmental health and safety regulations
New competition laws and regulations aimed at technology sector, AI and digital platforms
Antitrust and competition regulations
OECD/G20 Framework Pillar Two 15% global minimum tax
Conflict minerals regulations (Democratic Republic of Congo and adjoining countries)
Substance restrictions including PFAS regulations
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
Greenhouse gas emission limits and disclosure requirements
EU AI Act (effective August 2024, fully effective August 2026)
Reversal of Chevron doctrine affecting FDA regulatory authority

sanction_risks: Export and import restrictions on Israeli products and businesses
US-China trade tensions and potential tariffs
Tariffs on Chinese, Mexican, Canadian goods
Trade protection measures and customs restrictions
